policyMetadata.noncomplianceMessage: The Application Insights Component Contributor RBAC role is only allowed to be assignned to a given set of principals. For remediation, see https://confluence.office01.internalcorp.net:8453/display/DRCPKB/Role+Based+Access+Control+policies .

policyDefinition.displayName: APG DRCP RBAC Application Insights Component Contributor role
policyDefinition.description: This policy ensures that the Application Insights Component Contributor role cannot be assigned.
